>龙国因历史断绝，屡战屡败，国运被不断掠夺。
>当最后一道国运即将易主，默默无闻的图书管理员林萧走上擂台。
>西方嘲笑：“龙国已无将可唤！”
>林萧燃尽热血，以魂为引：“大汉骠骑将军，冠军侯——霍去病，何在？”
>少年将军横空出世，一骑绝尘，横扫全场。
>这仅仅是开始。霍去病枪指苍穹：“吾辈同泽，可愿再守这华夏河山？”
>霎时，擂台上将星如雨——
>白起、项羽、赵子龙、岳飞……龙魂归位，寰宇皆惊！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/9855359b30bf3c3ab38f0fb027bfc2c8~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"屿纣","author_id":"","book_id":"7595447960633101336","book_name":"历史武将对决，我来唤醒龙国武将","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":500,"name":"断层","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=500&name=断层&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7595448005822513688","read_count":"21142","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"338500"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"166","tags":"都市高武,都市,直播,国运,断层","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5c34d3fbc8907a8c0053ba3e6c68b6b5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779323701&x-signature=MtSvMHrW%2FFokw6xYQfy0qUkEOJM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"62849302924","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"35"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322083501A629536DF625291CD9B1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":934},"user_action":{"author":
